text: Fast setup, editable sections, category-ready media

Footer.desc: Editable website content powered by one category and template JSON file.

AboutPage.title: We build thoughtful websites for growing brands.
AboutPage.desc: Our team combines strategy, design, and technology to create digital experiences that explain your business clearly and help visitors take action.
AboutPage.desc2: From the first idea to the final launch, we focus on useful content, clean layouts, and flexible sections that your team can keep improving over time.
AboutPage.subtitle: Our approach
AboutPage.philosophyDesc: We start by understanding the business, the audience, and the decisions visitors need to make. Then we shape pages around strong messaging, useful sections, and simple editing workflows.

CustomPage.title: A flexible page ready for your content.
CustomPage.desc: This demo paragraph is loaded from the same JSON content source as the rest of the template. Replace it with the message, offer, or story this page should explain.
CustomPage.desc2: Use this section as a simple starting point with a small pretitle, clear heading, useful paragraph, and supporting image.

ServicePage.title: Helpful services built around your next step.
ServicePage.desc: Use this page to explain the core services, support, and outcomes your team provides for every visitor.
ServicePage.desc2: Each service card can be edited from the same JSON-backed editor, including text, images, and supporting details.
ServicePage.subtitle: What we provide

productSlides.productInfoDesc: Clarify goals, audience needs, and the right structure before visitors take action.
Present offers, proof, and conversion paths through clean editable sections.
Keep enquiries, updates, and follow-up simple for both visitors and your team.
Improve page content and calls to action as new visitor needs become clear.

productItems.title: Planning
productItems.desc: Clarify goals, audience needs, and the right structure before visitors take action.

productItems.title: Execution
productItems.desc: Present offers, proof, and conversion paths through clean editable sections.

productItems.title: Support
productItems.desc: Keep enquiries, updates, and follow-up simple for both visitors and your team.

ContactPage.title: Start a clear conversation with our team.
ContactPage.desc: Share a few details and our team will help you choose the right next step with simple, practical guidance.

Testimonial.title: Trusted by people who care about results.
Testimonial.desc: Use real customer feedback to build trust with new visitors.

testimonialItems.name: Aarav Mehta
testimonialItems.quote: The site made our work easier to understand and brought in better leads within the first week.

testimonialItems.name: Neha Kapoor
testimonialItems.quote: Clean sections, fast pages, and the editor keeps the content simple for our whole team.

testimonialItems.name: Rahul Verma
testimonialItems.quote: We finally have a website that looks premium and still feels practical to update.

testimonialItems.name: Isha Malhotra
testimonialItems.quote: The layouts gave our brand a sharper story and made every service easier to browse.

testimonialItems.name: Kabir Anand
testimonialItems.quote: We could test different sections quickly without losing the polished look of the page.

testimonialItems.name: Sara Khan
testimonialItems.quote: Visitors understand what we offer faster, and enquiries feel more relevant now.

Banner.title: Find a home that fits your next chapter.
Banner.desc: Browse curated apartments, villas, and investment properties with transparent pricing, verified documents, and guided site visits.

bannerSlides.title: Move into verified homes faster
bannerSlides.desc: Shortlist ready-to-visit properties with trusted local guidance.

bannerSlides.title: Invest in high-growth locations
bannerSlides.desc: Compare neighborhoods, amenities, pricing, and rental potential.

About.title: Real estate guidance from search to keys.
About.subtitle: Verified homes, smarter visits, clearer decisions
About.desc: We help families and investors shortlist the right properties using neighborhood insight, pricing context, and documentation checks.
About.desc2: From first call to final paperwork, our advisors keep every step simple, transparent, and focused on your goals.
About.philosophyDesc: Real options, clear numbers, and reliable local support.

Product.productSubtitle: Ready for site visits this week
Product.productInfoDesc: Handpicked residences with strong amenities, smart layouts, and verified ownership documents.

productSlides.productInfoDesc: Open views, clubhouse access, and fast metro connectivity.

productItems.title: Skyline Residences
productItems.desc: High-floor homes with open views, clubhouse access, and quick metro connectivity.

productItems.title: Green Villa Enclave
productItems.desc: Private garden, premium finishes, and a quiet gated community address.

WhyChooseUs.title: Property decisions with clearer proof.
WhyChooseUs.desc: Help buyers compare real options, verified documents, and guided site visits.

whyChooseUsItems.title: Verified listings
whyChooseUsItems.desc: Every featured property includes basic document and visit checks.

whyChooseUsItems.title: Local advisors
whyChooseUsItems.desc: Neighborhood guidance helps buyers compare price, location, and lifestyle.

whyChooseUsItems.title: Simple visits
whyChooseUsItems.desc: Site visits and follow-ups are handled with clear next steps.

Gallery.title: Homes, interiors, and location views.
Gallery.desc: Show category-specific property visuals in every gallery layout.

FormDetail.title: Tell us what kind of home you need.
FormDetail.desc: Share your budget, location, and timeline so an advisor can respond.

faqItems.question: Can I book a site visit?
faqItems.answer: Yes, share your preferred date and our advisor will coordinate the visit.

faqItems.question: Are documents verified?
faqItems.answer: Featured listings include basic ownership and documentation checks.

faqItems.question: Do you help with loans?
faqItems.answer: Loan and legal support can be coordinated after property shortlisting.

BusinessBanner1.title: Launch a sharper website for your company.

bannerSlides.desc: Explain your services with strong sections and simple editing.

bannerSlides.title: Built around your services
bannerSlides.desc: Explain your offers with clear layouts and conversion paths.

About.title: A business website built around trust.
About.subtitle: Services, proof, and fast lead capture
About.desc: Show what your business does, why customers choose you, and how visitors can get in touch.
About.desc2: The content is business-specific while template designs can change component by component.
About.philosophyDesc: Clear messaging, strong sections, and fast editing for teams.

Product.productInfoDesc: Use service cards to explain offers, packages, capabilities, or featured work.

productSlides.productInfoDesc: A focused service block for your leading offer.

WhyChooseUs.title: Business pages built for trust and leads.
WhyChooseUs.desc: Explain your offer clearly and guide visitors toward action.

whyChooseUsItems.title: Sharp positioning
whyChooseUsItems.desc: Clear service messaging for customers who need quick answers.

whyChooseUsItems.title: Conversion flow
whyChooseUsItems.desc: Sections are arranged around proof, offers, and enquiries.

whyChooseUsItems.title: Fast editing
whyChooseUsItems.desc: Teams can update service content without rebuilding the design.

Gallery.title: Show your team, work, and process.
Gallery.desc: Business visuals stay inside the business category folder.

FormDetail.title: Tell us about your business goal.
FormDetail.desc: Capture business enquiries with fields that match service-led websites.

faqItems.question: Can this show services?
faqItems.answer: Yes, service cards and sections can be customized for your company.

faqItems.question: Can we change content later?
faqItems.answer: Yes, the editor is built around reusable section data.

faqItems.question: Is this useful for lead generation?
faqItems.answer: Yes, forms, CTAs, and proof sections are designed for enquiries.

Banner.title: A school where curiosity becomes confidence.
Banner.desc: Share admissions, academics, activities, and parent trust through a flexible website your team can edit.

bannerSlides.title: Learning that feels alive
bannerSlides.desc: Highlight classrooms, activities, and student stories with editable slides.

bannerSlides.title: Academics, arts, and sports
bannerSlides.desc: Present a complete school experience with reusable website sections.

bannerSlides.title: Academics, arts, and sports that extend our outh
bannerSlides.desc: Present a complete school experience with reusable website sections.

About.title: Strong academics with thoughtful student care.
About.subtitle: A balanced environment for learning and growth
About.desc: We help students build strong fundamentals, creative confidence, and real-world curiosity through guided learning.
About.desc2: Parents get clear communication, structured programs, and a school community focused on every child.
About.philosophyDesc: Learning works best when students feel seen, supported, and challenged at the right pace.

Product.productInfoDesc: Present classes, activities, facilities, and admission highlights with reusable cards.

productItems.title: Primary School
productItems.desc: Foundational learning with language, numeracy, activities, and creative confidence.

productItems.title: Senior School
productItems.desc: Exam readiness, mentoring, and future planning for senior students.

WhyChooseUs.title: A school experience parents can trust.
WhyChooseUs.desc: Use this section to explain care, academics, activities, and communication.

whyChooseUsItems.title: Balanced learning
whyChooseUsItems.desc: Academics, activities, and values are presented together.

whyChooseUsItems.title: Parent clarity
whyChooseUsItems.desc: Admissions, programs, and contact steps stay easy to find.

whyChooseUsItems.title: Student growth
whyChooseUsItems.desc: Show the environment, teachers, and programs that support students.

Gallery.title: Classrooms, campus, and student life.
Gallery.desc: School visuals always come from the school category folder.

FormDetail.title: Ask about admissions and campus visits.
FormDetail.desc: Parents can enquire about classes, tours, and the admission process.

faqItems.question: Are admissions open?
faqItems.answer: Yes, admission enquiries can be submitted through the form section.

faqItems.question: Can parents visit campus?
faqItems.answer: Campus tours can be scheduled based on available slots.

faqItems.question: Which classes are available?
faqItems.answer: Program cards can show primary, middle, and senior school details.
